de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SExpr

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SExpr
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Writable

    public class SExpr
extends java.lang.Object
implements Writable
    This class models s-expressions to be used for the SMT translation. Every s-expression has got a name and a (potentially empty) list of children. They can be printed out, non-simple names are escaped for SMT.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  SExpr.Type
      An enumeration of the types that an SExpr can assume.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SExpr(java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name)
      Create a new s-expr without children of type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type)
      Create a new s-expr without children, but with a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, java.lang.String... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.

    • Constructor Detail

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             SExpr.Type type)
        Create a new s-expr without children, but with a given type.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        type - the non-null type to use

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name)
        Create a new s-expr without children of type SExpr.Type.NONE.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             SExpr.Type type,
             java.util.List<SExpr> children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        type - the non-null type to use
        children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             java.util.List<SExpr> children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             SExpr.Type type,
             java.lang.String... children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and a given type. The array of String children is mapped to a list of SExprs.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        type - the non-null type to use
        children - the list of children to use.

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             java.lang.String... children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE. The array of String children is mapped to a list of SExprs.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        children - the list of children to use.

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             SExpr.Type type,
             SExpr... children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        type - the non-null type to use
        children - the list of children to use.

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.lang.String name,
             SExpr... children)
        Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
        Parameters:
        name - the non-null name of the atom
        children - the list of children to use.

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(SExpr... children)
        Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
        Parameters:
        children - the list of children to use.

      • SExpr

        public SExpr(java.util.List<SExpr> children)
        Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
        Parameters:
        children - the list of children to use. Should not be modified elsewhere.

    • Method Detail

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()

      • getType

        public SExpr.Type getType()

      • getChildren

        public java.util.List<SExpr> getChildren()

      • appendTo

        public void appendTo(java.lang.StringBuilder sb)
        Append the SMTLIB2-representation of this object to the given string builder.
        Specified by:
        appendTo in interface Writable
        Parameters:
        sb - a non-null string builder to write to.

      • map

        public SExpr map(java.util.function.Function<SExpr,SExpr> mapFunction)
        Create a new SExpr by applying a function to all children of this object. The atomic name is not modified, nor is the function applied in depth.
        Parameters:
        mapFunction - a non-null function to be applied to the children.
        Returns:
        a new SEXpr with the same name and type and with the mapFunction applied to all children.
